metadata.description: Independent Claude Code plugins by HTE Switzerland. Each plugin lives in its own repo and ships independently; this marketplace is a discovery manifest only.

plugins.name: claude-dejavu
plugins.description: Memory + recovery + code grounding. Restores deleted sessions, hybrid Postgres+Weaviate recall across past conversations, tree-sitter symbol indexing across 12 languages, eight identifier-grounding domains (env / DB / route / GraphQL / flag / CSS / i18n / module-export), and a 14-strategy deterministic rewriter that catches fabricated names before disk write. 89.3% reduction in hallucinated identifiers (n=400).

plugins.name: claude-chillbro
plugins.description: Auto-approves obviously-safe Bash commands and in-project file writes so Claude Code stops asking permission for every grep, cat, ls, and new file. Static allow/ask lists (~110 + ~75 patterns), self-learning (commands you've approved twice get auto-approved next time), context-aware probes (force-push to main asks, push to feature branch allows; public-repo gh actions ask, private-repo allows), and a headless 'claude -p' classifier as a last-resort fallback for unknown commands. No API key needed; reuses the user's existing Claude Code auth.
